title: Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple
tagline: Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple is a re-established 200 years-old temple in the Nellore district of Andhra Pradesh, sacred to the goddess Poleramma.
overview.description: Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple is a re-established 200 years-old temple in the Nellore district of Andhra Pradesh, sacred to the goddess Poleramma. Poleramma is a pre-Vedic deity, who is predominantly worshipped in Andhra Pradesh, and a local form of Sakti. She is worshipped as Grama devata (goddess who protects the village). The new temple was established in the center of the village, although Poleramma is a coast goddess whose temples are usually established at the outskirts of villages.

topPlaces.description: Damegunta is a village in Kodavalur mandal, situated in Nellore district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.In Damegunta village population of children with age 0–6 is 122 which makes up 8.75 % of total population of village.

topPlaces.name: Vidavalur
topPlaces.description: Vidavaluru is a village and a mandal headquarters in Nellore district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India. It is located in Kovur.

topPlaces.name: Kodavalur
topPlaces.description: Kodavalur or Kodavaluru is a village in Nellore district in the state of Andhra Pradesh in India The Maldevi River runs through Kodavalur. It is Located in Kovur (Assembly constituency).

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (123 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (129 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Beeramgunta Poleramma Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Damegunta, Vidavalur, Kodavalur.
